title: EpicFight : Physic Rag Doll
description: Configurable rag doll physics compatibility between Epic Fight and Physics mods
body:
⚠️This mod is client side only

Credit to [@thebusdriver](https://www.curseforge.com/members/thebusdriver/projects), who created the original code and the first repository: [epicfight-x-phys-tweaks](https://github.com/Mactott/epicfight-x-phys-tweaks). This project was taken over and is now maintained by me, with permission from [@thebusdriver](https://www.curseforge.com/members/thebusdriver/projects). This mod adds compatibility for mob rag dolls between Epic Fight and the Physics mod. A configuration file is included, allowing you to blacklist any entities that should not be able to be Rag Doll.
